result.summary: Google Play Games Services exposes one developer surface: the authenticated Web REST API at `https://games.googleapis.com/`, using Google OAuth access tokens/scopes.

google_oauth_account.label: Google account OAuth consent
google_oauth_account.setup: Create or choose a Google Cloud project, enable the Google Play Games Services API in the Games services / Google Cloud setup, and configure the OAuth consent screen and OAuth 2.0 client IDs required by Play Games Services. Developers usually obtain this by signing in with a Google account and then configuring the project in [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/). The resulting OAuth access token is what the Web REST API accepts. For server-side access, request the Play Games scopes mentioned in the docs, such as `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/games` or `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/games_lite`.

surfaces.name: Google Play Games Services Web REST API
